title: PM Baseline And Parser Draft Packet History Demotion Execution
objective: Normalize the remaining live-looking 2026-04-18 PM baseline/parser packet-definition JSON chain so those files no longer present themselves as still-live execution packets after standalone repo cutover and instead act as historical packet provenance with explicit current-routing redirects.
dependency_note: After Packet 192, the remaining PM baseline/parser residue is isolated to the historical 2026-04-18 packet-definition JSON chain from `pm-schema-020d` through `pm-schema-020h`. The corresponding parent-root handoff lane has already been demoted, so these packet JSONs are now the strongest current-looking residue inside that branch.
execution_scope: Retitle the PM baseline/parser packet-definition JSON family as historical provenance.
Add explicit `historical_note` and `current_routing` fields to each packet JSON.
Preserve the original packet bodies below those top-entry routing fields without reopening runtime or implementation scope.
forbidden_scope: broad packet-archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing normalization
success_criteria: The PM baseline/parser packet-definition JSON family now reads as historical provenance instead of live execution packets.
Each file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and leaves the PM UI/read-surface family as the remaining adjacent execution slice if still needed.
next_action: Execute Packet 194 next as the remaining PM UI/read-surface draft packet history-demotion slice.
